login.title: Sign In
login.email_not_verified: Email not verified. Check your inbox.
login.reactivate_prompt: You have {{days}} days left to reactivate
login.account_deleted: This account has been permanently deleted
login.account_deactivated_member: Your organization account has been deactivated by the administrator. Contact the admin to reactivate.
login.description: Enter your credentials to access the dashboard
login.security_password: Signed in. For your security, please set a new password.
login.account_locked_countdown: Too many failed attempts. Try again in {{minutes}} minutes.
login.account_locked_forgot_hint: Or, if you forgot your password,
login.account_locked_generic: Account locked due to too many failed attempts. Please try again later.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.name: Name
signup.invite_only_message: Registration is currently by invitation only. If you received an invite link, please use it to sign up.
signup.request_invite_success: Application sent! We will contact you soon.
signup.request_invite_error: Error sending. Please try again later.
signup.verify_email_message: We sent you a verification link. Click the link to activate your account.
signup.accept_terms: I have read and accept the

error_codes.EMAIL_ALREADY_REGISTERED: This email is already registered. Try signing in or recovering your password.
error_codes.REGISTRATION_CONFLICT: Registration conflict. Check your details and try again.
error_codes.INVITATION_EXPIRED: The invitation link has expired. Ask your admin to resend it.
error_codes.INVITATION_USED: This invitation has already been used. Try signing in with your existing credentials.

forgot_password.title: Reset password
forgot_password.description: Enter your email address to receive a reset link.
forgot_password.success: If the address exists, you will receive an email with instructions.

reset_password.title: New password
reset_password.description: Choose a secure password of at least 12 characters.
reset_password.token_missing: Token missing. Request a new reset link.
reset_password.invalid_link: Invalid link. Request a new reset link.

verify_email.success: Email verified successfully! You can now log in.

marketing.tagline: The Business Operating System for businesses that want to really know how things are going.
marketing.description: Cashflow, sales, customers and AI in a single experience: fewer scattered tools, more control over decisions.

verify_email_required.title: Verify your email
verify_email_required.subtitle: To use AFianco you must first confirm your email address.
verify_email_required.email_sent_to: We've sent a verification link to:
verify_email_required.instructions: Open your inbox, find the message from AFianco and click the link to activate your account.
verify_email_required.check_spam: Check your Spam or Promotions folder too.
verify_email_required.resend_error_toast: Failed to send. Please try again in a minute.
verify_email_required.resend_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
verify_email_required.change_account_link: Sign out and use another account
